locations.name: 危地马拉
locations.summary: 瓜地馬拉共和國（西班牙語：República de Guatemala），通稱瓜地馬拉（Guatemala），是中美洲北部的一個國家。該國地理位置優越，北接墨西哥，東北鄰伯利茲，東南與洪都拉斯和薩爾瓦多接壤，西瀕太平洋，東臨加勒比海的洪都…

locations.name: 墨西哥
locations.summary: 墨西哥合众国（西班牙語：Estados Unidos Mexicanos），通稱墨西哥（西班牙語：México），是北美洲南部的一个主权国家，北接美国，西濱太平洋，南鄰伯利兹、危地马拉，东面墨西哥湾。其领土面积达近198万平方公里，为美洲…

locations.name: 美国
locations.summary: 美利堅合眾國（英語：United States of America，縮寫：USA），简称美国、美利堅（英語：America）或合眾國（United States，縮寫：US），是位於北美洲的聯邦制共和國。其由50個州、首都华盛顿哥伦比亚…

locations.name: 恰帕斯州
locations.summary: 恰帕斯州（西班牙語：Chiapas），正式名称为恰帕斯自由和主权州（Estado Libre y Soberano de Chiapas），是墨西哥的一個州，位於該國東南部。東臨瓜地馬拉，南臨太平洋。 整體屬熱帶濕潤氣候。北部靠近塔巴斯科…

relations.subject: Grey silky-flycatcher
relations.evidence: The grey silky-flycatcher (Ptiliogonys cinereus) is a species of bird in the family Ptiliogonatidae. It is found in Guatemala and Mexico and as a vagrant in Texas, United States.{{cite book | last = | first = | title =Check-list of North American Birds | publisher =American Ornithologists' Union |edition =7th | date =1998 | location =Washington, D.C

relations.subject: Grey silky-flycatcher
relations.evidence: The grey silky-flycatcher (Ptiliogonys cinereus) is a species of bird in the family Ptiliogonatidae. It is found in Guatemala and Mexico and as a vagrant in Texas, United States.{{cite book | last = | first = | title =Check-list of North American Birds | publisher =American Ornithologists' Union |edition =7th | date =1998 | location =Washington, D.C

relations.subject: Grey silky-flycatcher
relations.evidence: molybdophanes: from Chiapas in southern Mexico south into south-central Guatemala The species has also been recorded as a vagrant in southern and western Texas. The grey silky-flycatcher inhabits pine, pine-oak, and juniper forest in the subtropical and temperate zones. It also occurs in pine savanna and rarely in cloudforest. Sources differ on its overall elevational range; one states it is and another mostly and lower in winter
